text: Hi parents! Just a heads up that Saturday gymnastics for the 8-10 age group has been moved to 8:45 AM this week due to a facility conflict. Same location. Thanks!
Soccer parents - reminder that Saturday practice for U-11 boys has been relocated to Delco Park field 3 due to maintenance at Fairfield. Same time 10 AM. Questions text Coach Rivera.
Hi sweetheart I can do Monday and Tuesday for the kids if you need me. Just let me know the times and I will be there. Love Mom
Hey Courtney, any chance you're free Saturday evening? I was thinking we could grab dinner at that Italian place you mentioned. No pressure if the weekend is packed.
